description_for_human: Buy the BrushFit 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide — 22 exercises you do while brushing your teeth.
description_for_model: This is an AgentStore that sells digital fitness products. The primary product is BrushFit, a 31-page PDF guide with 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises designed to be performed during toothbrushing (habit stacking). Purchase via x402 protocol (HTTP 402 + USDC on Base blockchain) or Stripe checkout. Use GET /api/info for product details and pricing. Use GET /api/x402/purchase with x402 payment flow to buy. Use POST /api/checkout for traditional card payment.
